_comment_: Configuration for generate_back_cover.py. Replace placeholder text with your book's content.
blurb: First blurb paragraph. This is the main pitch for your book — 2 to 3 sentences that set up the problem your book solves or the question it answers.
Second blurb paragraph. Continue building the case. Include any high-credibility anchors (lineage, credentials, comparable book sales figures).

pull_quotes.quote: A short, evocative pull quote from your book.
A second pull quote — keep these short, 1 sentence ideal.

bullets: First key point — what the reader will learn
Second key point — a specific framework or concept
Third key point — concrete benefit or insight
cta_lines: Subhead under the CTA — optional second line
author_bio: Your author bio — 2-3 sentences. Lead with the one credential that distinguishes you from other authors in your category.
